mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_FAQ (FAQ_ID, CATEGORY, QUESTION, ANSWER, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_LQ_FAQ_PK.NEXTVAL, #{category}, #{question}, #{answer}, 0, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LQ_FAQ ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT * FROM LQ_FAQ WHERE CATEGORY = #{category} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_FAQ SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE FAQ_ID = #{faqId}
